title: Comment from Healthcare Information Management and Systems Society (HIMSS), HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
commenter_name: Healthcare Information Management and Systems Society (HIMSS)
organization: Healthcare Information Management and Systems Society (HIMSS)
comment_text:
On behalf of the Healthcare Information and Management Systems Society (HIMSS), we are pleased to provide public comments on the ASTP Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity Notice of Proposed Rulemaking (RIN 0955-AA09). 

Detailed comments are attached.

attachments.title: HTI 5 Proposed Rule Public Comment Letter FINAL
